purpose: Professional online course database contract for VOD video courses, live online courses, blended offerings, enrollment, learning progress, comments, reactions, applications, and audit logs.

deferredTables.name: course_version
deferredTables.reason: Add when draft/review/publish/rollback versioning is required.

deferredTables.name: course_live_attendance_event
deferredTables.reason: Add when precise live attendance event replay and compliance reporting is required.

deferredTables.name: course_live_interaction
deferredTables.reason: Add when classroom Q&A, polls, raise-hand, chat, and co-host interaction archives are required.

deferredTables.name: course_certificate
deferredTables.reason: Add with Open Badges-style certificate issuance.

deferredTables.name: course_outbox_event
deferredTables.reason: Add when cross-service course events need durable publication.
